'''zayama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickelhexahydrite|nickelhexahydrite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-y-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickelhexahydrite|nickelhexahydrite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zayama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæyæmæth|zæyæmæth]] || [[word:zæyæmæj|zæyæmæj]] || [[word:zæyæmæsh|zæyæmæsh]] || [[word:zæyæmæ|zæyæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zayayamath|zayayamath]] || [[word:zayayamaj|zayayamaj]] || [[word:zayayamash|zayayamash]] || [[word:zayayama|zayayama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zayamath|zayamath]] || [[word:zayamaj|zayamaj]] || [[word:zayamash|zayamash]] || [[word:zayama|zayama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zayafmath|zayafmath]] || [[word:zayafmaj|zayafmaj]] || [[word:zayafmash|zayafmash]] || [[word:zayafmaf|zayafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zayamatha|zayamatha]] || [[word:zayamaja|zayamaja]] || [[word:zayamasha|zayamasha]] || [[word:zayamaka|zayamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zayamath|zayamath]] || [[word:zayamaj|zayamaj]] || [[word:zayamash|zayamash]] || [[word:zayama|zayama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zayamathal|zayamathal]] || [[word:zayamajal|zayamajal]] || [[word:zayamashal|zayamashal]] || [[word:zayamakal|zayamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zayamathatha|zayamathatha]] || [[word:zayamajaja|zayamajaja]] || [[word:zayamashasha|zayamashasha]] || [[word:zayamaka|zayamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zayamathan|zayamathan]] || [[word:zayamajan|zayamajan]] || [[word:zayamashan|zayamashan]] || [[word:zayamakan|zayamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zayamathaoro|zayamathaoro]] || [[word:zayamajaoro|zayamajaoro]] || [[word:zayamashaoro|zayamashaoro]] || [[word:zayamakaoro|zayamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
